session.assistant: All files formatted. Now let me re-run CI to verify everything passes.

tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param: Run `make fast-ci` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them. This is a read-only operation.

session.tool_result:
The command failed with exit code 2. Here's the summary:
**make fast-ci FAILED**
Exit code: 2 (make error)
**Failures:**
**Prettier Format Check Issue:** - Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Overall Results:**
- Lint: PASSED (All checks passed) - Format Check (ruff): PASSED (1689 files already formatted) - Prettier Check: FAILED - 2 files need formatting - Markdown Check: PASSED - Exec Reference Check: PASSED - Type Check (ty): PASSED (All checks passed) - Unit Tests (erk): PASSED (5988 passed, 2 warnings in 14.31s) - Tests (erk-dev): PASSED (136 passed in 6.06s) - Tests (erk-statusline): PASSED (115 passed in 0.79s) - Tests (erk-mcp): PASSED (31 passed)
The only issue is that 2 Markdown files need Prettier formatting applied. All other checks and tests passed successfully. agentId: ad43dca (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)
session.assistant: Two pre-existing files also need formatting. Let me fix those too.
Now let me re-run CI one more time to confirm clean.

tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param: Run `make fast-ci` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them. This is a read-only operation.

session.tool_result:
## Results: make fast-ci PASSED
All checks in the fast CI pipeline passed successfully:
**Summary:** - **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1689 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5988 passed, 2 warnings (deprecation warnings about Click BaseCommand) - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: All passed - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing**: PASSED (19 files checked, 0 violations)
**Total tests**: 6,239 tests passed with 2 minor deprecation warnings (expected and non-blocking) agentId: a16212e (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)
session.assistant: All CI checks pass. Let me finalize.
